name: Asianet News
description: Asianet News is a leading Malayalam news channel, offering the latest news updates, political discussions, and breaking stories from Kerala and around the globe.

name: Shinchan Tamil
description: Watch your favorite mischievous kid Shinchan and his family on hilarious adventures in Tamil. Non-stop entertainment for children of all ages.

name: Mazhavil Manorama SD
description: Mazhavil Manorama is a leading Malayalam entertainment channel known for high-production dramas, reality TV programs, and blockbuster cinema.

name: Manorama News
description: Manorama News delivers up-to-the-minute news coverage, debates, and analytical talk shows. Stay informed with credible journalism in Malayalam.

name: Mazhavil Manorama HD
description: Enjoy Mazhavil Manorama in crystal-clear High Definition. Premium serials, blockbuster movies, and top-tier reality programs at their best visual quality.

name: Safari TV
description: Safari TV is a unique exploration and travel channel in Malayalam, bringing you the wonders of history, geography, and world cultures through visual diaries.

name: Kairali News
description: Kairali News is a leading Malayalam news channel, offering credible news reporting, political analyses, and round-the-clock news flashes.

name: Kairali We
description: Kairali We is a youth-centric entertainment channel from Kairali TV network, bringing comedy, music, lifestyle, and modern serials.

name: Media One News
description: Media One is a popular Malayalam news broadcasting channel covering debates, human interest journalism, national highlights, and global reports.

name: Karuppu Tamil 2026
description: Karuppu (கருப்பு) is a Tamil action drama film that shows the story of a strong hero who fights against injustice in a village.

name: Star Sports 1 HD
description: Star Sports 1 HD brings live cricket, football, kabaddi, tennis, and other major sporting events in high-definition quality.

name: Star Sports 2 HD
description: Star Sports 2 HD offers live coverage of international and domestic sports including cricket, football, motorsports, and more in HD.

name: Mathrubhumi News
description: Mathrubhumi News is a prominent 24-hour Malayalam-language free-to-air satellite television news channel based in Kerala, India. Launched on January 23, 2013, it is owned and operated by the Mathrubhumi Printing & Publishing Co. Ltd., which also publishes the widely read Mathrubhumi newspaper.

name: Drishiyam 3
description: Drishyam 3 is a 2026 Malayalam-language crime drama directed by Jeethu Joseph, starring Mohanlal. It follows a highly anxious Georgekutty as the parents of Varun—consumed by grief and resentment—engineer an elaborate fake marriage and extortion trap to expose his family, prompting one final, emotional cat-and-mouse game.
